label: Mark Player Collectible
description: Remembers that the player collected a named pickup during this server session.

parameters.label: Player
parameters.description: Player receiving the collectible mark. Empty means the current triggering player.

parameters.label: Collectible Key
parameters.description: Stable collectible key, such as Coin01 or SecretGem.

beginnerSummary: Do remember that this player picked up this collectible.
